name: Synup Social vs. eClincher
hero_summary: Meet your new eClincher alternative, and experience a platform where the thrill of data meets the art of social media! If you're a fan of eClincher's fantastic analytics and community management tools, prepare to be blown away. Synup Social isn't just an upgrade; it's a game-changer. Imagine knowing exactly which tweet, post, or story is your star performer and why. That’s what Synup Social does! And with an intuitive post creator, you can create posts that resonate with current trends or echo your past victories.
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_heading: Change the way you use analytics for good
section_2_summary: Ready to do more with less? While eClincher helps you create content, it’s a crutch that won’t heal your broken leg (bad content and poor data insights). Synup Social has an intuitive platform with even better insights that will help you actually meet your goals. While eClincher is beloved by mid-sized agencies, Synup Social is distinguished by:
section_2_slider_1_summary: If you want your posts to be data-driven, you need a platform that prioritizes analytics. eClincher’s analytics lack the post-by-post analysis that lets you see what drives day-to-day engagement. Synup shows you which posts are driving engagement over time and features interactive engagement graphs to easily track and monitor your brand’s performance. Ready, set, grow!
section_2_slider_2_summary: Have writer’s block? No problem. While eClincher has no content creation support, Synup Social inspires your top-performing posts. Get innovative post ideas based on industry trends, current events, or your best content. Plus, our AI-powered post creator means your first draft is already done.
section_2_step_3_summary: Collaboration is the name of the game. While both eClincher and Synup Social have collaborative workflows, nobody does it like Synup. We’ve perfected approval workflows and created smart white labeled solutions - so client work is a breeze. Manage your content cohesively and build a content calendar that everyone signed off on. Easy peasy!
section_2_slider_4_summary: eClincher is beloved by mid-sized agencies, but its support for multi-brand management isn’t perfect. With Synup Social, you can easily schedule multi-location or multi-brand posts with ease. And with smart white-labeled solutions, you can take all the credit!
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over eClincher?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: eClincher and Synup Social are both renowned for their smart approaches to content management. While Synup makes content creation a breeze, eClincher’s smart queues cut down scheduling time. eClincher is targeted towards mid-sized agencies, making Synup Social the perfect eClincher alternative. Both boast incredible white-labeling abilities, but for agencies and SMBs alike, Synup delivers every time.

seo.description: Tired of eClincher? See what's out there and learn about the #1 eClincher alternative.
